title: Voota crack Simunye in regionals
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Simunye's hopes of tasting...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Simunye's hopes of tasting the regional league title were dashed last weekend when they went down against Voota (Knysna) at the Lawaaikamp Stadium in George.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Simunye's hopes of tasting the regional league title were dashed last weekend when they went down against Voota (Knysna) at the Lawaaikamp Stadium in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After coming back from 1-0 down, Voota earned maximum points away from home when they punished Simunye FC 2-1 in a tough game.","html":"After coming back from 1-0 down, Voota earned maximum points away from home when they punished Simunye FC 2-1 in a tough game."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Voota and Simunye are fighting to reach the top five on the log table."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both sides were playing entertaining football throughout the game with Voota absorbing the pressure from the home team's wingers and Simunye's Afika Tywetywe playing a dominant role in the centre of the field.","html":"Both sides were playing entertaining football throughout the game with Voota absorbing the pressure from the home team's wingers and Simunye's Afika Tywetywe playing a dominant role in the centre of the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"However, the star of the game was Voota's Khanyiso Fatyela, who scored a brace.","html":"However, the star of the game was Voota's Khanyiso Fatyela, who scored a brace."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Siyabonga \"Mpumlo\" Miggels of Simunye netted the first goal.","html":"Siyabonga \"Mpumlo\" Miggels of Simunye netted the first goal."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Khanyiso Fatyela soon levelled the score and managed his brace with a great header later in the first half."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the score on 2-1, Simunye had the opportunity to redeem themselves through a penalty, but failed to score, and Voota earned maximum points with their 2-1 victory.","html":"With the score on 2-1, Simunye had the opportunity to redeem themselves through a penalty, but failed to score, and Voota earned maximum points with their 2-1 victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Weekend results","html":"Weekend results"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday 29 March","html":"Saturday 29 March"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC Rebels 2-4 Fast Eleven","html":"FC Rebels 2-4 Fast Eleven"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC United 1-0 Simunye FC","html":"FC United 1-0 Simunye FC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kabu Yellow 0-1 Bitou Young Pirates","html":"Kabu Yellow 0-1 Bitou Young Pirates"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sea Birds 1-0 Voota FC","html":"Sea Birds 1-0 Voota FC"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Smuts United 0-3
